title: glycine max subsp. formosana
intro: Glycine max subsp. formosana, also known as Taiwanese soybean or Formosan soybean, is a subspecies of soybean (Glycine max) native to Taiwan. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Glycine max subsp. formosana include reducing the risk of heart disease, cancer, and osteoporosis, as well as improving cognitive function and immune system. In traditional herbal preparations, Glycine max subsp. formosana is often used in teas, soups, and infusions, as well as in powder or capsule form, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
